sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: First Take: Google Revamps Its Data Architecture With Agentic Data Cloud
feed.summary: Google has announced its new Agentic Data Cloud, which enhances metadata and semantics to improve data engineering for AI pipelines. This update helps reduce vendor lock-in and represents an evolution in tooling rather than an entirely new platform. Chief Data & Analytics Officers (CDAOs) should evaluate its impact on their data engineering operating models, AI pipeline architectures, and governance as they scale agent-driven AI workloads.

feed.title: Truist Financial Corporation $TFC Shares Sold by Kanawha Capital Management LLC
feed.summary: Kanawha Capital Management LLC significantly reduced its stake in Truist Financial Corporation (NYSE:TFC) in Q4, selling 29,601 shares. Several company insiders, including CAO Cynthia B. Powell and CFO Michael Baron Maguire, also offloaded substantial amounts of TFC stock, materially lowering their personal holdings. Despite insider selling, Truist Financial reported strong Q1 earnings, beating analyst estimates, and maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with a 4.1% dividend yield.

feed.title: ON Semiconductor Corp. Hits New 52-Week High of $89.69
feed.summary: ON Semiconductor Corp. has reached a new 52-week high of $89.69, attributed to its strong performance in the Other Electrical Equipment industry, despite trailing the S&P 500's growth. The company boasts a low debt-to-equity ratio of 0.06 and a solid return on equity of 10.06%, demonstrating its financial health and profitability. This milestone highlights significant upward movement from its previous 52-week low of $36.27.

feed.title: CenterPoint Energy's quarterly profit rises on surging data center demand
feed.summary: CenterPoint Energy reported a rise in its first-quarter profit, driven by the increasing electricity demand from data centers supporting artificial intelligence technologies. The utility plans to invest approximately $65.5 billion over the next decade to upgrade infrastructure and meet this growing demand, projecting significant customer savings despite concerns over rising electricity prices. CenterPoint expects to provide electric services to 8 GW of projects in the Greater Houston area by 2029, with 3.5 GW already under construction.

feed.title: Mizuho raises Equinix stock price target to $1,165 on data center strength
feed.summary: Mizuho has increased its price target for Equinix Inc. (NASDAQ:EQIX) to $1,165 from $900, maintaining an Outperform rating, and also raised Digital Realty Trust's (NYSE:DLR) price target to $217 from $180, also with an Outperform rating. The firm anticipates continued outperformance from data center REITs due to accelerating core business growth and strong demand for data center services. Both companies are expected to see significant revenue and adjusted funds from operations growth, with Digital Realty Trust also closing a $3.25 billion hyperscale data center fund.

feed.title: Hasbro Delays Quarterly Results After Cybersecurity Incident
feed.summary: Hasbro has delayed its quarterly earnings report following a cybersecurity incident that involved unauthorized access to its network. Despite the security breach, the toymaker anticipates a 3% to 5% rise in preliminary first-quarter sales, surpassing analysts' average expectation of 2.5% growth. The company made this announcement on Thursday, April 23, 2026.

feed.title: FirstEnergy Ohio filing outlines about $4 to $5 monthly bill increases
feed.summary: FirstEnergy's Ohio electric companies plan to file a Three-Year Rate Plan (TYRP) by May 22, 2026, proposing an average of $800 million annually for grid upgrades and $83 million for tree trimming. This forward-looking plan aims to improve reliability and make bill changes more predictable, introducing estimated residential distribution bill increases of 2.2-2.8%, equating to approximately $4-$5 per month. The plan focuses solely on distribution charges, not electricity supply costs.

feed.title: Earnings Flash (KDP) Keurig Dr Pepper Posts Q1 Revenue $3.98B, vs. FactSet Est of $3.84B
feed.summary: Keurig Dr Pepper (KDP) has announced its Q1 revenue, reaching $3.98 billion, which surpasses the FactSet estimate of $3.84 billion. Additionally, the company reported Q1 adjusted EPS of $0.39, exceeding the FactSet estimate of $0.37. These results indicate a strong financial performance for the beverage company in the first quarter.

feed.title: Uber's AV pivot: Growth opportunity or margin risk?
feed.summary: The provided content is empty, so a summary cannot be generated.

feed.title: Nio shares its highlights for 2026 Beijing Auto Show
feed.summary: Nio Inc. will present its three brands—Nio, Onvo, and Firefly—together for the first time at the 2026 Beijing Auto Show, showcasing 11 models and 12 full-stack technologies. The event will feature the public debut of the Nio ES9, a special edition of the ES8, and updated models from Onvo and Firefly. Nio will also launch the 2026 Formula Student China series and highlight environmental protection projects.

feed.title: Globe Life lifts 2026 outlook despite Q1 earnings miss
feed.summary: Globe Life reported double-digit profit growth and raised its full-year 2026 earnings guidance despite missing Wall Street's first-quarter expectations for net operating income and revenue. The insurer's net operating income of $3.43 per diluted share fell short of analyst estimates, yet management projects confidence with an increased outlook of $15.40 to $15.90 per diluted share for the full year. Key divisional performances, particularly in life and health net sales, and strategic share repurchases, underscore the company's positive trajectory.

feed.title: American Express Profit Jumps 15%, Topping Wall Street’s Estimates
feed.summary: American Express reported a 15% increase in profit compared to the previous year, exceeding Wall Street's expectations. This growth was driven by the highest quarterly spending rate from its affluent cardmembers in three years.

feed.title: Blackstone Q1 earnings beat, bolstered by Infrastructure, Tactical Opportunities returns (BX:NYSE)
feed.summary: Blackstone (BX) reported Q1 earnings that surpassed analyst estimates, driven by strong returns in its Infrastructure and Tactical Opportunities strategies. While overall assets under management increased, net inflows were slightly below expectations. The company's Liquid Credit and Opportunistic Real Estate strategies experienced negative returns during the quarter.

feed.title: Dow reports wider first-quarter loss as sales, prices decline
feed.summary: Dow Inc. reported a wider first-quarter loss for 2026, with net sales down 6% to $9.8 billion and a net loss of $445 million. This was primarily attributed to 7% declining prices, weaker global demand, and geopolitical disruptions, leading to a 14 cents per share adjusted operating loss. Despite these challenges, the company's "Transform to Outperform" efficiency program is expected to yield $2 billion in improvements, and Dow reported strong cash flow of $1.1 billion for the quarter.

feed.title: Hasbro delays quarterly results after cybersecurity incident
feed.summary: Hasbro has delayed its first-quarter results following a cybersecurity incident that involved unauthorized access to its network in late March. Despite the delay, the toymaker expects first-quarter sales to increase between 3% and 5%, surpassing analysts' average expectation of 2.5% growth. Hasbro's shares rose by about 7% in premarket trading after the updated forecast.

feed.title: Fortive (NYSE:FTV) Lowered to Hold Rating by Zacks Research
feed.summary: Zacks Research has downgraded Fortive (NYSE:FTV) from a "strong-buy" to a "hold" rating, aligning with the street's consensus "Hold" rating and an average price target of $60.00. Despite the downgrade, Fortive exceeded quarterly expectations with $0.90 EPS against an anticipated $0.83, and revenue of $1.12 billion versus $1.09 billion, setting a positive FY2026 guidance. Institutional investors have significantly increased their stakes in the company, although a director recently sold a portion of her shares.

feed.title: What is Zacks Research's Forecast for FDS Q3 Earnings?
feed.summary: Zacks Research has reduced its Q3 2026 EPS forecast for FactSet Research Systems (FDS) to $4.33, while simultaneously raising longer-term estimates for FY2027 and FY2028. Despite mixed analyst sentiment and a consensus "Reduce" rating, FactSet recently surpassed Q1 EPS and revenue expectations and maintains a $4.40 annual dividend. The company also saw significant institutional investor activity in recent quarters.

feed.title: Synopsys, Inc. $SNPS Shares Sold by North Point Portfolio Managers Corp OH
feed.summary: North Point Portfolio Managers Corp OH reduced its stake in Synopsys, Inc. (NASDAQ:SNPS) by 28.5% in the fourth quarter, selling 11,043 shares. Despite this, other major institutions like Vanguard and State Street significantly increased their holdings, leading to institutional investors owning about 85.47% of the company's stock. Synopsys recently reported strong Q4 results, beating EPS and revenue estimates, and provided positive FY2026 guidance, though analyst ratings are split with a "Hold" consensus and an average price target of $531.00.

feed.title: ONEOK, Inc. $OKE Stock Position Cut by Davidson Capital Management Inc.
feed.summary: Davidson Capital Management Inc. significantly reduced its stake in ONEOK, Inc. (NYSE:OKE) by 32.3% in the fourth quarter, selling over 12,000 shares. Despite this, ONEOK exceeded Q4 earnings expectations with $1.55 EPS and $9.07 billion in revenue, and analysts hold a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with an average price target of $89.69. Other institutional investors like TCV Trust & Wealth Management Inc. and Empowered Funds LLC increased their holdings in the utilities provider during the same period.

feed.title: HB Wealth Management LLC Has $14.46 Million Stock Holdings in Chubb Limited $CB
feed.summary: HB Wealth Management LLC increased its stake in Chubb Limited by 11.2% in the fourth quarter, bringing its total holdings to 46,316 shares valued at $14.46 million. Despite Chubb beating Q1 core operating expectations, concerns about a softening property market and realized losses led to a modest stock pullback and mixed analyst reactions. Insiders sold $14.9 million worth of shares, while institutional investors, including Berkshire Hathaway, own a significant portion of the company's stock.

feed.title: North Point Portfolio Managers Corp OH Sells 120,409 Shares of Church & Dwight Co., Inc. $CHD
feed.summary: North Point Portfolio Managers Corp OH significantly reduced its stake in Church & Dwight Co., Inc. (NYSE:CHD) by selling 120,409 shares, leaving it with 3,660 shares valued at $307,000. Company insiders also sold substantial amounts of stock, bringing insider ownership to 2.0% while institutional investors hold 86.6%. Analysts maintain a consensus "Hold" rating for CHD with an average target price of $101.59.

feed.title: 12,187 Shares in Arista Networks, Inc. $ANET Purchased by Davidson Capital Management Inc.
feed.summary: Davidson Capital Management Inc. has acquired a new position of 12,187 shares in Arista Networks (NYSE:ANET), valued at approximately $1.6 million, increasing institutional ownership to 82.47%. Analyst sentiment for ANET is largely positive, with a consensus "Buy" rating and an average price target of $177.83, supported by multiple firms raising ratings and targets. However, significant insider selling, including CEO Jayshree Ullal's $55.8 million sale, has been noted, totaling approximately $154.7 million in insider sales over the last 90 days.

feed.title: G&S Capital LLC Raises Holdings in Citigroup Inc. $C
feed.summary: G&S Capital LLC significantly increased its stake in Citigroup Inc. during Q4, boosting its holdings by 138.6% to 28,470 shares, valued at $3.322 million. This increase makes Citigroup the firm's 26th largest holding, representing 1.2% of its investment portfolio. Other institutional investors also raised their positions, with hedge funds and institutional investors collectively owning about 71.72% of the stock.

feed.title: HB Wealth Management LLC Buys 20,069 Shares of Bank of America Corporation $BAC
feed.summary: HB Wealth Management LLC increased its stake in Bank of America (NYSE:BAC) by 5.1% in Q4, acquiring an additional 20,069 shares to total 409,871 shares valued at $22.54 million. Bank of America reported strong Q1 results with an EPS of $1.11 and $30.27 billion in revenue, surpassing analyst estimates. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with a target price of $60.90, despite some recent insider selling totaling $11.09 million.

feed.title: G&S Capital LLC Acquires 10,183 Shares of American Electric Power Company, Inc. $AEP
feed.summary: G&S Capital LLC significantly increased its stake in American Electric Power Company, Inc. (AEP) by 73.7%, acquiring an additional 10,183 shares and bringing its total holdings to 24,004 shares valued at $2.77 million. This move comes as several analysts have upgraded AEP, with a "Moderate Buy" consensus and an average price target of $138.32, despite recent insider share sales. AEP reported a quarterly EPS beat and provided FY2026 guidance, reinforcing analyst conviction in its future performance.

feed.title: Kraft Heinz (NASDAQ:KHC) Stock Rating Upgraded by Zacks Research
feed.summary: Zacks Research has upgraded Kraft Heinz (NASDAQ:KHC) from a "strong sell" to a "hold" rating, though the overall analyst consensus remains "Reduce" with a target price of $23.53. The company recently beat quarterly EPS expectations but saw revenue decline and reported a negative net margin, with FY2026 EPS guidance slightly above analyst forecasts. KHC's stock opened at $21.89, with institutional investors holding a significant stake while insiders have recently sold shares.

feed.title: Davidson Capital Management Inc. Invests $1.57 Million in Hubbell Inc $HUBB
feed.summary: Davidson Capital Management Inc. initiated a new position in Hubbell Inc. (NYSE:HUBB) during the fourth quarter, purchasing 3,527 shares valued at approximately $1.57 million. This comes as company insiders sold 34,689 shares worth about $17.4 million, reducing insider ownership to 0.63%. Hubbell reported Q4 EPS of $4.73, exceeding estimates, and provided FY2026 guidance largely in line with analyst expectations, which currently rate the stock a "Moderate Buy".

feed.title: American Express Profit Rises on Premium Customer Strength
feed.summary: American Express reported a higher first-quarter profit, surpassing analyst expectations, driven by the continued strength of its premium customer segment. The company's net income rose to $2.97 billion, or $4.28 per share, compared to $2.58 billion, or $3.64 per share, in the previous year. American Express also reaffirmed its full-year guidance for revenue growth and earnings per share.

feed.title: Earnings Flash (POOL) Pool Corporation Reports Q1 Revenue $1.14B, vs. FactSet Est of $1.10B
feed.summary: Pool Corporation (POOL) announced its Q1 revenue reached $1.14 billion, surpassing the FactSet estimate of $1.10 billion. Additionally, the company reported Q1 adjusted EPS of $1.43 per share, also exceeding the FactSet estimate of $1.35. These figures indicate a stronger-than-expected financial performance for the first quarter.

feed.title: Dow tops estimates as cost cuts help to narrow quarterly loss (DOW:NYSE)
feed.summary: Dow Inc. (DOW) exceeded Wall Street's revenue and adjusted earnings estimates for the first quarter, despite reporting a net loss. The company's performance was bolstered by cost reduction measures, which helped narrow the loss amidst challenges from lower prices and softer demand. Shares of Dow (DOW) rose 1.8% following the announcement.

feed.title: MSCI Shareholders Back Board, Pay Plan and Auditor
feed.summary: MSCI shareholders approved all 11 director nominees, the executive compensation package, and ratified PricewaterhouseCoopers LLP as the independent auditor for fiscal year 2026 during their annual meeting on April 21, 2026. This indicates strong investor support for the company's leadership and financial oversight. MSCI’s stock currently holds a Hold rating with a $612.00 price target, and TipRanks’ AI Analyst, Spark, assesses it as an Outperform, citing strong operating quality and cash generation despite balance-sheet risks and premium valuation.

feed.title: Simon Property Stock Slumps Amid New Wave Of Fears
feed.summary: Simon Property Group (SPG) shares are declining due to rising bond yields, geopolitical tensions, and increased oil prices, which are negatively impacting rate-sensitive real estate stocks. Adding to these concerns, AI-driven analysts have cut their ratings on SPG, citing its significant debt load and potential tariff risks for retail tenants. This volatility is further compounded by recent leadership changes following the death of CEO David Simon.

feed.title: JPMorgan Adjusts Price Target on Otis Worldwide to $88 From $94, Maintains Neutral Rating
feed.summary: JPMorgan has adjusted its price target for Otis Worldwide Corporation (OTIS) to $88, down from $94, while maintaining a Neutral rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects a revised outlook from the financial institution regarding the elevator and escalator manufacturer. The article also notes similar target price adjustments by other firms like BNP Paribas and Barclays, following Otis Worldwide's recent Q1 2026 earnings report and updated full-year guidance.

feed.title: American Express beats profit estimates as wealthy customers keep up spending
feed.summary: American Express surpassed first-quarter profit expectations due to continued high spending by its affluent customers on travel and discretionary items. The credit card giant reported a 9% rise in billed business to $428 billion and a 10% increase in revenue to $18.9 billion. This performance signals robust spending trends among high-end buyers, easing concerns for retailers catering to this segment.

feed.title: Keurig Dr Pepper Inc. (KDP) Tops Q1 EPS by 2c, Beats on Revenue; Offers FY26 Revenue Guidance
feed.summary: Keurig Dr Pepper Inc. (KDP) reported strong first-quarter results, surpassing analyst expectations for both earnings per share and revenue. The company announced Q1 EPS of $0.39, beating estimates by $0.02, and revenue of $3.98 billion, which exceeded the consensus of $3.83 billion. Furthermore, KDP provided optimistic revenue guidance for fiscal year 2026, projecting $25.9-26.4 billion against an analyst consensus of $25.89 billion.

feed.title: Maintenance demand lifts Pool Corp sales as pool season ramps up
feed.summary: Pool Corporation reported a solid start to 2026 with Q1 net sales up 6% to $1.1 billion and operating income growing 7% to $82.6 million. The company confirmed its full-year 2026 earnings guidance of $10.87 to $11.17 per diluted share, attributing growth to resilient maintenance demand and a gradual recovery in discretionary categories. While gross margin slightly decreased due to product mix, increased inventory and debt levels were noted, partly funding share repurchases.

feed.title: Analysts Offer Insights on Industrial Goods Companies: Equifax (EFX) and RTX (RTX)
feed.summary: RBC Capital analysts have offered bullish insights on Equifax (EFX) and RTX (RTX). Ashish Sabadra maintained a Buy rating on Equifax with a $222 price target, while Kenneth Herbert maintained a Buy rating on RTX with a $230 price target. Both companies received a "Moderate Buy" analyst consensus, indicating potential upside from current levels.

feed.title: Keurig Dr Pepper posts Q1 net sales $3.98B, adjusted EPS $0.39; reaffirms 2026 guidance
feed.summary: Keurig Dr Pepper reported first-quarter 2026 net sales of $3.98 billion, a 9.4% year-over-year increase, with an adjusted diluted EPS of $0.39. The company reaffirmed its 2026 guidance for constant currency net sales and adjusted EPS following the acquisition of JDE Peet’s. While U.S. Refreshment Beverages showed strong growth, U.S. Coffee segment faced volume/mix headwinds resulting in a slight decline in segment net sales.

feed.title: Perdoceo Education (NASDAQ:PRDO) Rating Lowered to Hold at Zacks Research
feed.summary: Zacks Research downgraded Perdoceo Education (NASDAQ:PRDO) from a "strong-buy" to a "hold" rating. Despite this downgrade, other analysts have reaffirmed "outperform" or "buy" ratings, with a consensus "Moderate Buy" and a $42.00 target price. The company reported strong Q4 2025 earnings, beating estimates, and provided positive Q1 and FY 2026 guidance, while notable insider stock sales have also occurred.

feed.title: Global Payments (NYSE:GPN) Upgraded to "Hold" at BMO Capital Markets
feed.summary: BMO Capital Markets has upgraded Global Payments (NYSE:GPN) to a "hold" rating, contributing to a consensus "Hold" rating among analysts with an average target price of $86.40. The company recently reported better-than-expected Q4 earnings with $3.18 EPS on $2.32 billion revenue and issued FY2026 guidance of $13.80-$14.00 EPS. Global Payments shares opened at $71.58, with a market cap of $19.7 billion and a P/E ratio of 12.36.

feed.title: US software stocks slide as IBM, ServiceNow results reignite AI disruption fears By Reuters
feed.summary: U.S. software stocks experienced a slide in premarket trading after IBM and ServiceNow reported quarterly results that raised concerns about AI-driven disruption in the sector. IBM's revenue growth slowed due to weakness in its software business, while ServiceNow noted delays in Middle East deals. Despite both companies exceeding analyst expectations for revenue and profit, investors remain wary of how AI advancements, particularly new automation tools, could impact traditional software businesses.

feed.title: M&T Bank Corp Raises Stake in Western Alliance Bancorporation $WAL
feed.summary: M&T Bank Corp significantly increased its stake in Western Alliance Bancorporation (NYSE:WAL) in Q4, boosting its holdings by 7,920.9% to 315,624 shares worth approximately $26.5 million. This move comes as Western Alliance reported strong Q1 results, beating EPS and revenue expectations and demonstrating solid margins and return on equity. The stock currently holds a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts, with institutional investors owning about 79.15% of the shares.

feed.title: M&T Bank Corp Increases Holdings in Charter Communications, Inc. $CHTR
feed.summary: M&T Bank Corp significantly increased its stake in Charter Communications (NASDAQ: CHTR) by 4,348.5% in the fourth quarter, now holding 128,651 shares valued at approximately $26.86 million. Despite the increased institutional interest, Wall Street analysts have a "Hold" consensus rating for Charter Communications, with a mixed outlook and an average target price of $335.11. The company recently reported a slight miss on its quarterly earnings and revenue estimates.

feed.title: Psyence BioMed Initiates Patient Dosing in Phase IIb Trial Evaluating NPX-5 for Adjustment Disorder
feed.summary: Psyence BioMed announced the dosing of the first patient in its Phase IIb clinical trial for NPX-5, a nature-derived psilocybin candidate, to treat Adjustment Disorder in cancer patients in palliative care. This marks the initial large-scale clinical evaluation of NPX-5 across an expanded Australian site network, aiming to assess its safety and therapeutic potential. The study expects to generate data on clinical response, safety, tolerability, and treatment durability to inform future development strategies.

feed.title: West Pharmaceutical Services (NYSE:WST) Surprises With Strong Q1 CY2026, Stock Soars
feed.summary: West Pharmaceutical Services (NYSE:WST) exceeded Wall Street's expectations for Q1 CY2026, reporting revenue of $844.9 million and an adjusted EPS of $2.13, significantly beating analyst estimates. The company also raised its full-year revenue and adjusted EPS guidance, attributing the strong performance to robust market demand and increased production. Following the positive results, the stock traded up 5.9% to $290.71.

feed.title: XXII Q1'26 Earnings: revenue estimate is 4.61M USD
feed.summary: 22nd Century Group, Inc. (XXII) is projected to report its Q1'26 earnings on April 30th, with an estimated revenue of $4.61 million USD and an anticipated EPS of ($1.20) USD. The article provides a detailed comparison of reported vs. estimated revenue and EPS for Q1'25 through Q1'26, highlighting the differences and surprises.

feed.title: AXTI Q1'26 Earnings: revenue estimate is 26.22M USD
feed.summary: AXT Inc (AXTI) is expected to announce its Q1'26 results on April 30, before the market opens, with earnings disclosed at 4:05 PM ET (8:05 PM UTC). The company's revenue estimate for Q1'26 is $26.22 million USD, and the earnings per share (EPS) are anticipated to be ($0.05) USD.

feed.title: German Court Rules in Favor of Teradyne Robotics and Issues Preliminary Injunction Against Elite Robots Deutschland in Copyright Infringement Case
feed.summary: A German court has issued a preliminary injunction against Elite Robots Deutschland GmbH, siding with Teradyne Robotics A/S in a copyright infringement case involving Universal Robots' software. The Regional Court of Hamburg ordered Elite Robots to stop distributing the disputed software and related products and to disclose customer information. Teradyne plans further action, emphasizing its commitment to protecting proprietary technology in the robotics sector.

feed.title: Board shrink at Chicago Atlantic (NASDAQ: REFI) as five directors stand for election
feed.summary: Chicago Atlantic Real Estate Finance, Inc. will hold its 2026 Annual Meeting on June 11, 2026, where stockholders will vote on the election of five directors and the ratification of BDO USA, P.C. as their independent auditor. The board's size will decrease from seven to five directors, with specific independent directors serving on key committees. The company also detailed its 2025 financial engagements, including $8.2 million in management and incentive fees and $4.93 million in reimbursed general and administrative expenses paid to its external manager, along with $688,975 in total fees paid to BDO USA, P.C. for audit and tax services.

feed.title: Steel Dynamics, Inc. (NASDAQ:STLD) Just Reported And Analysts Have Been Lifting Their Price Targets
feed.summary: Steel Dynamics (NASDAQ:STLD) shares surged 17% following its latest first-quarter results, with revenues of US$5.2 billion and statutory EPS of US$2.78. Analysts have subsequently increased their revenue and EPS forecasts for 2026, leading to a 16% lift in the price target to US$223 per share. The company is predicted to significantly outpace industry growth, with an annualised revenue growth forecast of 21% to the end of 2026.
